item.title: New Salford Arrives on the Yard
item.description: A brand-new Salford machine arrives on the yard. See the unboxing, setup, and first impressions of this powerful piece of farming equipment.

media:content.media:title: New Salford Arrives on the Yard
media:content.media:description: A brand-new Salford machine arrives on the yard. See the unboxing, setup, and first impressions of this powerful piece of farming equipment.

item.title: The Face of Discouragement
item.description: Capturing a moment of frustration and challenge. See the emotions, setbacks, and reactions that define the face of discouragement in tough situations.

media:content.media:title: The Face of Discouragement
media:content.media:description: Capturing a moment of frustration and challenge. See the emotions, setbacks, and reactions that define the face of discouragement in tough situations.

item.title: Is He Actually Quitting? Jordan’s Last Day
item.description: A look at Jordan’s potential last day on the job. See the moments leading up to the big decision and what it could mean for the team.

media:content.media:title: Is He Actually Quitting? Jordan’s Last Day
media:content.media:description: A look at Jordan’s potential last day on the job. See the moments leading up to the big decision and what it could mean for the team.

item.title: Puddle Jumping in a 9RX #5
item.description: Taking the 9RX tractor through deep puddles for fun and testing. Watch how it handles wet conditions and see the impressive power in action.

media:content.media:title: Puddle Jumping in a 9RX #5
media:content.media:description: Taking the 9RX tractor through deep puddles for fun and testing. Watch how it handles wet conditions and see the impressive power in action.

item.title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
item.description: Upgrading an 18-year-old tractor with new parts and improvements. See the enhancements, performance boost, and how it extends the tractor’s life.

media:content.media:title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
media:content.media:description: Upgrading an 18-year-old tractor with new parts and improvements. See the enhancements, performance boost, and how it extends the tractor’s life.

item.title: Five Trucks Aren’t Enough!
item.description: Facing a massive hauling task where five trucks aren’t enough. Watch the logistics, teamwork, and effort needed to get the job done efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Five Trucks Aren’t Enough!
media:content.media:description: Facing a massive hauling task where five trucks aren’t enough. Watch the logistics, teamwork, and effort needed to get the job done efficiently.

item.title: He’s Mega Stuck! Dougo!!
item.description: Watch as Dougo gets completely stuck in a tough spot. See the struggle, attempts to free him, and the fun chaos that follows.

media:content.media:title: He’s Mega Stuck! Dougo!!
media:content.media:description: Watch as Dougo gets completely stuck in a tough spot. See the struggle, attempts to free him, and the fun chaos that follows.

item.title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
item.description: Trying to get a snow blower running after running out of fuel. See if adding just 2 gallons is enough to power through and clear the snow.

media:content.media:title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
media:content.media:description: Trying to get a snow blower running after running out of fuel. See if adding just 2 gallons is enough to power through and clear the snow.

item.title: Last Video of the 4640 Before Sale
item.description: Watch the final moments of the 4640 tractor before it’s sold. A nostalgic look at its performance and memories on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Last Video of the 4640 Before Sale
media:content.media:description: Watch the final moments of the 4640 tractor before it’s sold. A nostalgic look at its performance and memories on the farm.

item.title: Dang, Kids Never Listen!
item.description: A funny and relatable moment showing kids ignoring instructions. Watch the chaos and humor that unfolds when advice goes unheeded.

media:content.media:title: Dang, Kids Never Listen!
media:content.media:description: A funny and relatable moment showing kids ignoring instructions. Watch the chaos and humor that unfolds when advice goes unheeded.

item.title: Snow Storm Projects
item.description: See the creative and practical projects tackled during a snowstorm. From snow removal to cozy indoor tasks, discover how to stay productive in winter weather.

media:content.media:title: Snow Storm Projects
media:content.media:description: See the creative and practical projects tackled during a snowstorm. From snow removal to cozy indoor tasks, discover how to stay productive in winter weather.

item.title: How Dougo Treats His Equipment
item.description: See how Dougo maintains and handles his equipment with care. Tips and techniques for keeping machinery in top condition on the farm.

media:content.media:title: How Dougo Treats His Equipment
media:content.media:description: See how Dougo maintains and handles his equipment with care. Tips and techniques for keeping machinery in top condition on the farm.
